title: Bridge Essay: Shared and Distinct Brain Regions Targeted for Immediate Early Gene Expression b

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nonordinary — psychedelic decoupling, ego dissolution, DMN disruption, altered states.

**Shared and Distinct Brain Regions Targeted for Immediate Early Gene Expression by Ketamine and Psilocybin.**. ACS Chem Neurosci.. PMID: 36630309. DOI: 10.1021/acschemneuro.2c00637. Psilocybin is apsychedelic with therapeutic potential. While there is growing evidence that psilocybin exerts its beneficial effects through enhancing neural plasticity, the exact brain regions involved are not completely understood. Determining the impact of psilocybin on plasticity-related gene expression throughout the brain can broaden our understanding of the neural circuits involved in psychedelic-evoked neural plasticity.
